parameters.query:
WITH v AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE('{{ $fromAI("cpf", "CPF do paciente apenas números") }}', '\\D', '', 'g') as c
),
val AS (
    SELECT c,
      ( ( (CAST(SUBSTR(c, 1, 1) AS INT) * 10 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 2, 1) AS INT) * 9 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 3, 1) AS INT) * 8 +
           CAST(SUBSTR(c, 4, 1) AS INT) * 7 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 5, 1) AS INT) * 6 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 6, 1) AS INT) * 5 +
           CAST(SUBSTR(c, 7, 1) AS INT) * 4 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 8, 1) AS INT) * 3 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 9, 1) AS INT) * 2) * 10 ) % 11 % 10 ) as d1
    FROM v
    WHERE LENGTH(c) = 11 AND c NOT IN ('00000000000', '11111111111', '22222222222', '33333333333', '44444444444', '55555555555', '66666666666', '77777777777', '88888888888', '99999999999')
),
val2 AS (
    SELECT c, (CAST(d1 AS TEXT) || CAST(( ( (CAST(SUBSTR(c, 1, 1) AS INT) * 11 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 2, 1) AS INT) * 10 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 3, 1) AS INT) * 9 +
                                            CAST(SUBSTR(c, 4, 1) AS INT) * 8 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 5, 1) AS INT) * 7 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 6, 1) AS INT) * 6 +
                                            CAST(SUBSTR(c, 7, 1) AS INT) * 5 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 8, 1) AS INT) * 4 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 9, 1) AS INT) * 3 + d1 * 2) * 10 ) % 11 % 10 ) AS TEXT)) as digits
    FROM val
),
final_check AS (
    SELECT c, digits = SUBSTR(c, 10, 2) as is_valid FROM val2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT c, false as is_valid FROM v WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM val2)
),
existing AS (
    SELECT p.id, p.nome FROM pacientes p, final_check f 
    WHERE p.cpf = f.c AND f.is_valid = true
    LIMIT 1
),
ins AS (
    INSERT INTO pacientes (id, nome, cpf, telefone, email, plano_saude)
    SELECT gen_random_uuid(), '{{ $fromAI("nome_completo") }}', f.c, '{{ $fromAI("telefone") }}', NULLIF('{{ $fromAI("email") }}', ''), '{{ $fromAI("plano_saude") }}'
    FROM final_check f
    WHERE f.is_valid = true AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
    RETURNING id, nome
)
SELECT id, nome, 'SUCESSO' as status FROM ins
UNION ALL
SELECT id, nome, 'EXISTENTE' as status FROM existing
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL as id, NULL as nome, 'CPF_INVALIDO' as status FROM final_check WHERE is_valid = false
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    m.id AS medico_id, 
    m.nome, 
    e.nome AS especialidade 
FROM medicos m 
LEFT JOIN especialidades e ON e.id = m.especialidade_id 
WHERE m.ativo = true 
ORDER BY e.nome;

UPDATE consultas 
SET status = 'cancelada'::consulta_status
WHERE id = '{{ $fromAI("consulta_id", "UUID da consulta a cancelar") }}'::uuid 
AND paciente_id = (
    SELECT id 
    FROM pacientes 
    WHERE cpf = '{{ $fromAI("cpf_paciente", "CPF do paciente (apenas números)") }}' 
    LIMIT 1
)
RETURNING id, data_hora, status;

SELECT c.id, c.data_hora AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' as data_hora_local, c.status, c.tipo, m.nome as medico, e.nome as especialidade FROM consultas c JOIN medicos m ON m.id = c.medico_id JOIN especialidades e ON e.id = m.especialidade_id WHERE c.paciente_id = '{{ $fromAI('paciente_id', 'UUID do paciente', 'string') }}'::uuid AND c.data_hora >= NOW() AND c.status NOT IN ('cancelada','faltou') ORDER BY c.data_hora LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO consultas (paciente_id, medico_id, data_hora, duracao_min, tipo, status, observacoes)
SELECT 
    p.id, 
    m.id, 
    v.target_dt, 
    COALESCE(e.duracao_padrao_min, 30),
    v.tipo::consulta_tipo, 
    'agendada', 
    v.obs
FROM (
    SELECT 
        '{{ $fromAI("cpf_paciente", "CPF do paciente apenas números") }}' as cpf,
        COALESCE(
            (SELECT id FROM medicos WHERE id = NULLIF('{{ $fromAI("medico_id", "UUID do médico obtido em Listar Médicos") }}', '')::uuid),
            (SELECT id FROM medicos WHERE nome ILIKE '%' || '{{ $fromAI("nome_medico", "Nome do médico") }}' || '%' LIMIT 1)
        ) as med_id,
        ('{{ $fromAI("data_hora", "Data e hora no formato ISO") }}'::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') as target_dt,
        LOWER('{{ $fromAI("tipo", "Tipo de consulta (presencial ou online)") }}') as tipo,
        '{{ $fromAI("observacoes") }}' as obs
) v
JOIN pacientes p ON p.cpf = v.cpf
JOIN medicos m ON m.id = v.med_id
JOIN especialidades e ON e.id = m.especialidade_id
JOIN horarios_disponiveis h ON h.medico_id = m.id 
    AND h.dia_semana = EXTRACT(DOW FROM v.target_dt)
    AND v.target_dt::time >= h.hora_inicio 
    AND v.target_dt::time < h.hora_fim
WHERE h.ativo = true
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feriados f WHERE f.data = v.target_dt::date)
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM consultas c 
      WHERE c.medico_id = m.id 
        AND c.data_hora::date = v.target_dt::date
        AND c.status != 'cancelada'
        AND (c.data_hora::time, c.data_hora::time + (COALESCE(c.duracao_min, e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute')) 
            OVERLAPS 
            (v.target_dt::time, v.target_dt::time + (COALESCE(e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute'))
  )
RETURNING id, status;

WITH v AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE('{{ $fromAI("cpf", "CPF do paciente sem formatação apenas números", "string") }}', '\\D', '', 'g') as c
),
val AS (
    SELECT c,
      ( ( (CAST(SUBSTR(c, 1, 1) AS INT) * 10 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 2, 1) AS INT) * 9 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 3, 1) AS INT) * 8 +
           CAST(SUBSTR(c, 4, 1) AS INT) * 7 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 5, 1) AS INT) * 6 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 6, 1) AS INT) * 5 +
           CAST(SUBSTR(c, 7, 1) AS INT) * 4 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 8, 1) AS INT) * 3 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 9, 1) AS INT) * 2) * 10 ) % 11 % 10 ) as d1
    FROM v
    WHERE LENGTH(c) = 11 AND c NOT IN ('00000000000', '11111111111', '22222222222', '33333333333', '44444444444', '55555555555', '66666666666', '77777777777', '88888888888', '99999999999')
),
val2 AS (
    SELECT c, (CAST(d1 AS TEXT) || CAST(( ( (CAST(SUBSTR(c, 1, 1) AS INT) * 11 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 2, 1) AS INT) * 10 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 3, 1) AS INT) * 9 +
                                            CAST(SUBSTR(c, 4, 1) AS INT) * 8 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 5, 1) AS INT) * 7 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 6, 1) AS INT) * 6 +
                                            CAST(SUBSTR(c, 7, 1) AS INT) * 5 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 8, 1) AS INT) * 4 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 9, 1) AS INT) * 3 + d1 * 2) * 10 ) % 11 % 10 ) AS TEXT)) as digits
    FROM val
)
SELECT p.id, p.nome, p.cpf, p.telefone, p.email, p.plano_saude, p.data_nascimento 
FROM pacientes p, val2 v
WHERE p.cpf = v.c 
  AND v.digits = SUBSTR(v.c, 10, 2)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    p.data_v as data,
    slots.horario::time as horario_disponivel
FROM (
    SELECT generate_series(CURRENT_DATE, CURRENT_DATE + 90, '1 day'::interval)::date AS data_v
) p
JOIN horarios_disponiveis h ON h.medico_id = COALESCE(
    (SELECT id FROM medicos WHERE id = NULLIF('{{ $fromAI("medico_id", "UUID do médico ou vazio") }}', '')::uuid),
    (SELECT id FROM medicos WHERE nome ILIKE '%' || '{{ $fromAI("nome_medico", "Nome do médico") }}' || '%' LIMIT 1)
)
     AND h.dia_semana = EXTRACT(DOW FROM p.data_v)
JOIN medicos m ON m.id = h.medico_id
JOIN especialidades e ON e.id = m.especialidade_id
CROSS JOIN LATERAL generate_series(
    (p.data_v + h.hora_inicio)::timestamp,
    (p.data_v + h.hora_fim - (COALESCE(e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute'))::timestamp,
    (COALESCE(e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute')
) AS slots(horario)
WHERE (NULLIF('{{ $fromAI("data") }}', '') IS NULL OR p.data_v = NULLIF('{{ $fromAI("data") }}', '')::date)
  AND h.ativo = true
  -- FILTRO DE HORÁRIO PASSADO: Só mostra horários maiores que o momento atual
  AND slots.horario > (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feriados f WHERE f.data = p.data_v)
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM consultas c 
      WHERE c.medico_id = h.medico_id 
        AND c.data_hora::date = p.data_v
        AND (c.data_hora::time, c.data_hora::time + (COALESCE(c.duracao_min, e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute')) 
            OVERLAPS 
            (slots.horario::time, slots.horario::time + (COALESCE(e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute'))
        AND c.status != 'cancelada'
  )
ORDER BY p.data_v, slots.horario
LIMIT 200;
SELECT id, nome, descricao, duracao_padrao_min FROM especialidades ORDER BY nome;

    SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE('{{ $fromAI("cpf", "CPF do paciente apenas números") }}', '\\D', '', 'g') as c

                                            CAST(SUBSTR(c, 4, 1) AS INT) * 8 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 5, 1) AS INT) * 7 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 6, 1) AS INT) * 6 +
                                            CAST(SUBSTR(c, 7, 1) AS INT) * 5 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 8, 1) AS INT) * 4 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 9, 1) AS INT) * 3 + d1 * 2) * 10 ) % 11 % 10 ) AS TEXT)) as digits

ins AS (

    FROM final_check f
    WHERE f.is_valid = true AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
    RETURNING id, nome
)
SELECT id, nome, 'SUCESSO' as status FROM ins
UNION ALL
SELECT id, nome, 'EXISTENTE' as status FROM existing
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL as id, NULL as nome, 'CPF_INVALIDO' as status FROM final_check WHERE is_valid = false
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    m.id AS medico_id, 
    m.nome, 
    e.nome AS especialidade 
FROM medicos m 
LEFT JOIN especialidades e ON e.id = m.especialidade_id 
WHERE m.ativo = true 
ORDER BY e.nome;

UPDATE consultas 
SET status = 'cancelada'::consulta_status
WHERE id = '{{ $fromAI("consulta_id", "UUID da consulta a cancelar") }}'::uuid 
AND paciente_id = (
    SELECT id 
    FROM pacientes 
    WHERE cpf = '{{ $fromAI("cpf_paciente", "CPF do paciente (apenas números)") }}' 
    LIMIT 1
)
RETURNING id, data_hora, status;

SELECT c.id, c.data_hora AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' as data_hora_local, c.status, c.tipo, m.nome as medico, e.nome as especialidade FROM consultas c JOIN medicos m ON m.id = c.medico_id JOIN especialidades e ON e.id = m.especialidade_id WHERE c.paciente_id = '{{ $fromAI('paciente_id', 'UUID do paciente', 'string') }}'::uuid AND c.data_hora >= NOW() AND c.status NOT IN ('cancelada','faltou') ORDER BY c.data_hora LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO consultas (paciente_id, medico_id, data_hora, duracao_min, tipo, status, observacoes)
SELECT 
    p.id, 
    m.id, 
    v.target_dt, 
    COALESCE(e.duracao_padrao_min, 30),
    v.tipo::consulta_tipo, 
    'agendada', 
    v.obs
FROM (
    SELECT 
        '{{ $fromAI("cpf_paciente", "CPF do paciente apenas números") }}' as cpf,
        COALESCE(
            (SELECT id FROM medicos WHERE id = NULLIF('{{ $fromAI("medico_id", "UUID do médico obtido em Listar Médicos") }}', '')::uuid),
            (SELECT id FROM medicos WHERE nome ILIKE '%' || '{{ $fromAI("nome_medico", "Nome do médico") }}' || '%' LIMIT 1)
        ) as med_id,
        ('{{ $fromAI("data_hora", "Data e hora no formato ISO") }}'::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') as target_dt,
        LOWER('{{ $fromAI("tipo", "Tipo de consulta (presencial ou online)") }}') as tipo,
        '{{ $fromAI("observacoes") }}' as obs
) v
JOIN pacientes p ON p.cpf = v.cpf
JOIN medicos m ON m.id = v.med_id
JOIN especialidades e ON e.id = m.especialidade_id
JOIN horarios_disponiveis h ON h.medico_id = m.id 
    AND h.dia_semana = EXTRACT(DOW FROM v.target_dt)
    AND v.target_dt::time >= h.hora_inicio 
    AND v.target_dt::time < h.hora_fim
WHERE h.ativo = true
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feriados f WHERE f.data = v.target_dt::date)
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM consultas c 
      WHERE c.medico_id = m.id 
        AND c.data_hora::date = v.target_dt::date
        AND c.status != 'cancelada'
        AND (c.data_hora::time, c.data_hora::time + (COALESCE(c.duracao_min, e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute')) 
            OVERLAPS 
            (v.target_dt::time, v.target_dt::time + (COALESCE(e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute'))
  )
RETURNING id, status;

    SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE('{{ $fromAI("cpf", "CPF do paciente sem formatação apenas números", "string") }}', '\\D', '', 'g') as c

      ( ( (CAST(SUBSTR(c, 1, 1) AS INT) * 10 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 2, 1) AS INT) * 9 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 3, 1) AS INT) * 8 +
           CAST(SUBSTR(c, 4, 1) AS INT) * 7 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 5, 1) AS INT) * 6 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 6, 1) AS INT) * 5 +
           CAST(SUBSTR(c, 7, 1) AS INT) * 4 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 8, 1) AS INT) * 3 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 9, 1) AS INT) * 2) * 10 ) % 11 % 10 ) as d1

    SELECT c, (CAST(d1 AS TEXT) || CAST(( ( (CAST(SUBSTR(c, 1, 1) AS INT) * 11 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 2, 1) AS INT) * 10 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 3, 1) AS INT) * 9 +
                                            CAST(SUBSTR(c, 4, 1) AS INT) * 8 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 5, 1) AS INT) * 7 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 6, 1) AS INT) * 6 +
                                            CAST(SUBSTR(c, 7, 1) AS INT) * 5 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 8, 1) AS INT) * 4 + CAST(SUBSTR(c, 9, 1) AS INT) * 3 + d1 * 2) * 10 ) % 11 % 10 ) AS TEXT)) as digits

SELECT 
    p.data_v as data,
    slots.horario::time as horario_disponivel
FROM (
    SELECT generate_series(CURRENT_DATE, CURRENT_DATE + 90, '1 day'::interval)::date AS data_v
) p
JOIN horarios_disponiveis h ON h.medico_id = COALESCE(
    (SELECT id FROM medicos WHERE id = NULLIF('{{ $fromAI("medico_id", "UUID do médico ou vazio") }}', '')::uuid),
    (SELECT id FROM medicos WHERE nome ILIKE '%' || '{{ $fromAI("nome_medico", "Nome do médico") }}' || '%' LIMIT 1)
)
     AND h.dia_semana = EXTRACT(DOW FROM p.data_v)
JOIN medicos m ON m.id = h.medico_id
JOIN especialidades e ON e.id = m.especialidade_id
CROSS JOIN LATERAL generate_series(
    (p.data_v + h.hora_inicio)::timestamp,
    (p.data_v + h.hora_fim - (COALESCE(e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute'))::timestamp,
    (COALESCE(e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute')
) AS slots(horario)
WHERE (NULLIF('{{ $fromAI("data") }}', '') IS NULL OR p.data_v = NULLIF('{{ $fromAI("data") }}', '')::date)
  AND h.ativo = true
  -- FILTRO DE HORÁRIO PASSADO: Só mostra horários maiores que o momento atual
  AND slots.horario > (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feriados f WHERE f.data = p.data_v)
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM consultas c 
      WHERE c.medico_id = h.medico_id 
        AND c.data_hora::date = p.data_v
        AND (c.data_hora::time, c.data_hora::time + (COALESCE(c.duracao_min, e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute')) 
            OVERLAPS 
            (slots.horario::time, slots.horario::time + (COALESCE(e.duracao_padrao_min, 30) * interval '1 minute'))
        AND c.status != 'cancelada'
  )
ORDER BY p.data_v, slots.horario
LIMIT 200;
SELECT id, nome, descricao, duracao_padrao_min FROM especialidades ORDER BY nome;
